'''Arth Gxin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] in the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Gxin served under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] on the ''[[Right to Rule]]'' during the invasion. Gxin joined [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Tahiri Veila]] and [[Jagged Fel]] onboard the ''[[Collaborator]]'' to aid the crew of the [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]] Bay Communications Base during the [[Battle of Esfandia]].
